sourcesContent:
const en = {
  common: {
    home: "Home",
    findJob: "Find Job",
    candidates: "Candidates",
    pricing: "Pricing Plans",
    login: "Login",
    register: "Register",
    viewAll: "View All",
    apply: "Apply",
    save: "Save",
  },
  home: {
    heroTitle: "Connect",
    heroSubtitle: "Talent & Opportunities",
    heroDescription: "Leading job search and translation platform in Vietnam",
    animatedTexts: [
      "Professional Interpreters",
      "Attractive Job Opportunities",
      "Global Connections",
      "Career Within Reach",
    ],
    stats: [
      { number: "50,000+", label: "Jobs" },
      { number: "25,000+", label: "Candidates" },
      { number: "5,000+", label: "Companies" },
      { number: "98%", label: "Success Rate" },
    ],
    features: [
      { icon: "🌐", title: "Professional Translation", desc: "Connect with trusted interpreters" },
      { icon: "⚡", title: "Quick Apply", desc: "Apply with just 1 click" },
      { icon: "💼", title: "Global Opportunities", desc: "Jobs worldwide" },
    ],
    featuredJobs: {
      title: "Featured Interpreter Jobs",
      subtitle: "Great opportunities for professional interpreters",
    },
    testimonials: {
      title: "What Our Users Say",
      subtitle: "Positive feedback from our user community",
      reviews: [
        {
          id: 1,
          name: "Nguyen Minh Anh",
          role: "Interpreter",
          rating: 5,
          content:
            "G-Bridge helped me find many great job opportunities. The platform is very user-friendly and customer support is excellent.",
        },
        {
          id: 2,
          name: "Tran Van Nam",
          role: "HR Manager - FPT Software",
          rating: 5,
          content:
            "We have recruited many quality interpreters through G-Bridge. The recruitment process is fast and efficient.",
        },
        {
          id: 3,
          name: "Le Thi Huong",
          role: "Freelance Translator",
          rating: 4,
          content:
            "Beautiful interface, easy to use. I found many projects that match my skills.",
        },
      ],
    },
    cta: {
      title: "Start your career journey today!",
      description: "Join the community of thousands of candidates and recruiters",
      registerNow: "Register Now",
      login: "Login",
    }
  },
  auth: {
    register: {
      title: "Create Account",
      subtitle: "Join the G-Bridge community today",
      fullName: "Full Name",
      fullNamePlaceholder: "Enter your full name",
      role: "You are",
      interpreter: "Interpreter",
      employer: "Employer",
      email: "Email",
      emailPlaceholder: "Enter your email",
      password: "Password",
      passwordPlaceholder: "Enter your password",
      confirmPassword: "Confirm Password",
      confirmPasswordPlaceholder: "Re-enter your password",
      submit: "Create Account",
      already: "Already have an account?",
      login: "Login now",
      or: "Or sign up with",
      required: "Please enter",
      invalidEmail: "Invalid email",
      passwordLength: "Password must be at least 6 characters",
      passwordMatch: "Passwords do not match",
      loading: "Processing...",
      showPassword: "Show password",
      hidePassword: "Hide password",
    },
    login: {
      title: "Login",
      subtitle: "Welcome back! Please sign in to your account.",
      email: "Email address",
      emailPlaceholder: "example@email.com",
      password: "Password",
      passwordPlaceholder: "Enter your password",
      remember: "Remember me",
      forgot: "Forgot password?",
      login: "Login",
      loggingIn: "Logging in...",
      socialOr: "Or login with",
      noAccount: "Don't have an account?",
      registerFree: "Register for free",
      emailRequired: "Please enter email",
      emailInvalid: "Invalid email",
      passwordRequired: "Please enter password",
      switchHint: "Switch language",
      showPassword: "Show password",
      hidePassword: "Hide password",
    }
  }
};

export default en;
